{"cards": [{"name": "Emberforge Warrior", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": ""Strike fast, strike twice, strike fear into their hearts."", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Aggressive common creature with haste and menace. 2/1 for 2 mana with two relevant keywords pushes the aggressive envelope while staying within common complexity limits. Menace pairs well with haste for immediate pressure."}, {"name": "Inferno Tyrant", "mana_cost": "{4}{R}{R}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, haste
When ~ enters, it deals 4 damage to any target.
Whenever ~ attacks, you may have it deal 2 damage to target creature defending player controls.", "flavor_text": "Its roar shakes mountains. Its breath melts stone. Its fury knows no bounds.", "power": "6", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Splashy mythic dragon with immediate board impact and ongoing value. ETB deals 4 damage for versatility, attack trigger provides repeatable value. 6/4 flying haste for 6 mana is pushed but appropriate for mythic rarity."}, {"name": "Verdant Pathfinding", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": ""Every trail leads somewhere. The wise know which ones lead home."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple land search spell at common. 2 mana for a basic land to hand is fair rate for common ramp. Uses standard 'search your library' templating with reveal, to hand, then shuffle sequence."}, {"name": "Thornback Behemoth", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "It doesn't go around obstacles. It doesn't go over them. It goes through them.", "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Big trampling beater at common. 5/4 trample for 5 mana hits the common P/T ceiling (P+T = CMC+4) while providing a simple, impactful threat. Single keyword keeps complexity appropriate for common."}, {"name": "Symbiotic Growth", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "Whenever a creature enters under your control, you may pay {1}. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.
Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have trample.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Build-around enchantment that rewards playing creatures. Optional mana payment prevents it from being oppressive, while the trample grant provides meaningful upside. Multi-ability design appropriate for uncommon complexity."}]}
